repositories.name: Cast Metadata & TV Controls
repositories.description: Unifies Google Cast, Android/Google TV, ADB, manufacturer media players, inputs, apps, metadata, persistent physical identities, capability routing, app management, activities, Wake-on-LAN, transition events, health diagnostics, and Repairs into one controller per physical device.

repositories.name: Unified TV Card
repositories.description: Container-responsive Home Assistant TV controller card with persistent dynamic app and input dropdowns, managed favourites, activities, mute beside volume, playback, remote controls, artwork, health, and diagnostics.
